market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: What about the American consumer?
articles.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Alex Tapscott on the stalling of the CLARITY Act and how it's impacting the average American consumer. Then, Aisha Hunt writes that crypto will grow by upgrading Wall Street’s trusted products rather than replacing them.

articles.title: Instagram is alerting users who were targeted by hackers during AI chatbot attacks
articles.description: Hackers appeared to take over victims’ accounts even after Meta said it fixed its AI-powered support chatbot, which granted hackers access to victims’ accounts.

articles.title: Bitcoin copying 2022 'almost perfectly' as trader sees key support failing
articles.description: Bitcoin traders warned of a key BTC price support trend line failing as 2022 bear market history continued to repeat.

articles.title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
articles.description: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.

articles.title: Hyperliquid bear turns bullish after losing over $46M shorting HYPE
articles.description: The whale is now backing Arthur Hayes’ favored HYPE, ZEC and NEAR plays, signaling a sharp pivot toward momentum-led crypto bets.

articles.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
articles.description: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

articles.title: Ethereum drops to 14-week lows: Can ETH price hold $1.8K support?
articles.description: Ethereum price slides to a 14-week low as weakening demand and persistent ETF outflows put the key $1,800 support at risk.

articles.title: Still facing copyright lawsuits, AI music generator Suno raises another $400M
articles.description: The prominent AI music generation startup is now valued at over $5.4 billion -- about seven months ago, it raised at a $2.45 billion valuation.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Every single bank will soon need to hold digital assets, says Zodia CEO Julian Sawyer
articles.description: Sawyer confirmed that Standard Chartered’s full acquisition of the firm is on track to target a signing at the end of June and complete by the end of August.

articles.title: Binance discloses revenue-sharing deal with Alpaca
articles.description: A Binance legal document disclosed a revenue-sharing agreement with Alpaca, which includes sharing 50% of the stock custodian’s order flow revenue with the cryptocurrency exchange.

articles.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
articles.description: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

articles.title: GitLab cuts 14% of staff as it scales its platform to serve AI workloads
articles.description: The company is reducing its workforce as it exits 22 countries, reduces management layers, and invests in its infrastructure to scale its platform.

articles.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
articles.description: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

articles.title: Binance to end NFT support on exchange, shift service to wallet
articles.description: Binance exchange said it will move NFT support from its exchange to its non-custodial wallet and offered users 30 days to migrate their NFTs.

articles.title: Kraken parent Payward brings tokenized IPO access to retail investors
articles.description: Kraken and xStocks Alliance will let eligible users seek allocations in US IPOs at the offering price through tokenized shares in coming weeks.

articles.title: Zcash fixes Orchard bug after emergency network upgrade
articles.description: Zcash Open Development Lab said the network briefly became unstable as miners upgraded, while the Zcash Foundation said there was no evidence of an exploit.

articles.title: Rare physical bitcoin worth $1.78 million gets cashed in after 12 years
articles.description: The S1-COIN-25 physical bitcoin, part of Mike Caldwell's 2011-2013 mint, had its tamper-evident hologram peeled and the 25 BTC swept on-chain on Wednesday.

articles.title: Trezor says Safe 7 chip flaw found by Ledger does not put funds at risk
articles.description: Trezor and Tropic Square disclosed a TROPIC01 chip vulnerability found during a Ledger Donjon audit, saying the Safe 7 wallet and user funds remain secure.

articles.title: The worst hacks and breaches of 2026 (so far)
articles.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.
